OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 00
Recv ID: 00
Baudrate: 125000
Func Addr: 00
Func Name: CAN

  {

    "sentbytes": "02F8",
    "name": "APB_CANHS_R_02",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Couple d'embrayage": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Position embrayage fine": {

      },
      "Inclinaison véhicule en pente": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },

]
